records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! Spencer!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! Spencer!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! Spencer!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're alive. I'm so relieved...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're alive. I'm so relieved...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're alive. I'm so relieved...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you... all right? There's a steel bar stuck in your midsection.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you... all right? There's a steel bar stuck in your midsection.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you... all right? There's a steel bar stuck in your midsection.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I was going to die to the C.O.s, but suddenly I heard a roar, and then the floor collapsed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I was going to die to the C.O.s, but suddenly I heard a roar, and then the floor collapsed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I was going to die to the C.O.s, but suddenly I heard a roar, and then the floor collapsed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ack! *Cough* *Cough*
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ack! *Cough* *Cough*
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ack! *Cough* *Cough*

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I woke up... this is the shape I was in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I woke up... this is the shape I was in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I woke up... this is the shape I was in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I tried to escape on my own, but I can't feel anything below my waist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I tried to escape on my own, but I can't feel anything below my waist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I tried to escape on my own, but I can't feel anything below my waist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The steel bar must have severed your spinal cord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The steel bar must have severed your spinal cord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The steel bar must have severed your spinal cord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll start getting you out of there. I'm gonna borrow your saw for a bit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll start getting you out of there. I'm gonna borrow your saw for a bit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll start getting you out of there. I'm gonna borrow your saw for a bit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Feel free.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Feel free.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Feel free.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to cut my waist off?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to cut my waist off?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to cut my waist off?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be ridiculous. I'm just going to cut the steel bar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be ridiculous. I'm just going to cut the steel bar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be ridiculous. I'm just going to cut the steel bar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How are you? Can you move?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How are you? Can you move?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How are you? Can you move?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... I must've lost too much blood. I feel dizzy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... I must've lost too much blood. I feel dizzy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... I must've lost too much blood. I feel dizzy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're complaining about the dizziness, you must be doing all right for someone with a hole in her stomach.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're complaining about the dizziness, you must be doing all right for someone with a hole in her stomach.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're complaining about the dizziness, you must be doing all right for someone with a hole in her stomach.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, I heal pretty fast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, I heal pretty fast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, I heal pretty fast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take it easy. Even if Counters have outstanding regeneration abilities, you still need time to recover.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Take it easy. Even if Counters have outstanding regeneration abilities, you still need time to recover.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Take it easy. Even if Counters have outstanding regeneration abilities, you still need time to recover.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! Thanks for saving me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! Thanks for saving me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! Thanks for saving me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Spencer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Spencer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Spencer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who were you chasing? I thought I heard more than one footstep.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who were you chasing? I thought I heard more than one footstep.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who were you chasing? I thought I heard more than one footstep.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the kid who rescued us last time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the kid who rescued us last time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the kid who rescued us last time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think she must've been one of the test subjects left behind in this facility.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think she must've been one of the test subjects left behind in this facility.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think she must've been one of the test subjects left behind in this facility.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She might've been brainwashed to not leave this facility.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She might've been brainwashed to not leave this facility.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She might've been brainwashed to not leave this facility.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's like me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's like me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's like me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...How so?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...How so?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...How so?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was in a similar situation when I was young.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was in a similar situation when I was young.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was in a similar situation when I was young.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was locked up in a Northern Union lab and was subjected to a lot of drugs and stuff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was locked up in a Northern Union lab and was subjected to a lot of drugs and stuff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was locked up in a Northern Union lab and was subjected to a lot of drugs and stuff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, do you want to see?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, do you want to see?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, do you want to see?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was tied up for so long that the marks are still there even after becoming a Counter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was tied up for so long that the marks are still there even after becoming a Counter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was tied up for so long that the marks are still there even after becoming a Counter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I tried to escape or resist, small bits of metal would come out from the collar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I tried to escape or resist, small bits of metal would come out from the collar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I tried to escape or resist, small bits of metal would come out from the collar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not a pretty scar, so I keep it hidden for now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not a pretty scar, so I keep it hidden for now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not a pretty scar, so I keep it hidden for now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know you had such a past.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know you had such a past.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know you had such a past.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Then the Corruption Syndrome you were talking about
8v

Then the Corruption Syndrome you were talking about
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Then the Corruption Syndrome you were talking about
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I got it from the experiments I was put through.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I got it from the experiments I was put through.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I got it from the experiments I was put through.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Northern Union built bases in the Counterside to avoid the Administration's eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Northern Union built bases in the Counterside to avoid the Administration's eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Northern Union built bases in the Counterside to avoid the Administration's eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Test subjects brought there could never even dream of things like Eternium shields.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Test subjects brought there could never even dream of things like Eternium shields.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Test subjects brought there could never even dream of things like Eternium shields.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, most of them died from experiments other than the Corruption Syndrome. The same goes for my brother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm stuck in this hellscape as well, but I don't want to just leave that kid alone either.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm stuck in this hellscape as well, but I don't want to just leave that kid alone either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just some sympathy for someone who's in the shoes I once was.
